_comment: Controlled vocabulary for per-check topic tags (field name theme_tags). The Topic filter dropdown and the schema validation both read this file. A check's theme_tags array may only contain slugs defined here. sides controls which topics appear in the dropdown on the demand side, the supply side, or both. icon_class shows on the check-card chips (not in the dropdown options, which stay text-only).

themes.label: Conversion Tracking
themes.description: Is the conversion captured correctly? Tag firing, deduplication, the Conversions API, and value passing.

themes.label: Attribution
themes.description: Which touchpoint gets credit? Attribution model, lookback windows, view-through versus click-through, and modeled conversions.

themes.label: Bidding
themes.description: Bid strategy, budget allocation, pacing, and the signals feeding automated bidding.

themes.label: Targeting
themes.description: Audience setup, Customer Match, lookalikes, exclusions, remarketing, frequency, geography, and scheduling.

themes.label: Yield
themes.description: Floor pricing, unified pricing rules, refresh logic, fill rate, and bid density.

themes.label: Inventory
themes.description: Ad unit structure, sizes, lazy loading, and ad server configuration.

themes.label: Transparency
themes.description: Supply-chain transparency. ads.txt, app-ads.txt, sellers.json, the SupplyChain object, and made-for-advertising risk.

themes.label: Creative
themes.description: Asset coverage, ad strength, creative testing, and format or policy compliance.

themes.label: Data Quality
themes.description: Internal, self-inflicted trust problems. Unfiltered internal traffic, duplicate firing, platform-to-platform discrepancies, and test data in production. The numbers are wrong because of your own configuration.

themes.label: Brand Safety
themes.description: Where ads run and what runs on inventory. Placement controls, content categories, and exclusion lists.

themes.label: Fraud
themes.description: External, adversarial invalid activity. Bots, invalid traffic, and viewability fraud. The numbers are wrong because someone is gaming the system.

themes.label: Privacy
themes.description: Consent Mode, App Tracking Transparency, the consent management platform, TCF, GPP, and signal loss from privacy controls.

themes.label: Governance
themes.description: Account structure, user permissions, account linking, and naming conventions.

themes.label: Performance
themes.description: Load latency, script weight, and Core Web Vitals impact.

themes.label: Ad Experience
themes.description: Ad density, intrusive formats, and Better Ads Standards compliance.

themes.label: Compliance
themes.description: Legal and regulatory adherence. GDPR, CPRA, the Digital Markets Act, and COPPA.
